# Generated by Orchestre

> **This is a curated example, not the output of a real `/orchestre-go` run.**
> It was authored by hand to showcase the architecture and code quality Orchestre

> and file structure only.
>

> representative of a similar prompt — not measured from this file set.

---

## Original Prompt

```
/orchestre-go "Build an invoicing SaaS where freelancers can create, send, and
track invoices. Stripe for payments."
```

---

## 5 Questions & Answers

Orchestre asked 5 questions before generating any code:

| # | Question | Answer |
|---|----------|--------|
| 1 | **Who is the primary user?** Freelancers, agencies, or both? | Freelancers only. Solo users, no team/workspace features needed. |
| 2 | **What is the core feature loop?** Create invoice → send → get paid? Or also recurring invoices, estimates, time tracking? | Create → send via email → client pays via Stripe link → freelancer sees "paid" status. No recurring, no estimates for MVP. |
| 3 | **Payment model?** Free tier + paid? Flat fee? Per-invoice pricing? | Free up to 5 invoices/month. Pro plan at $12/month via Stripe Billing for unlimited invoices. |
| 4 | **Existing code?** Starting from scratch or migrating? | From scratch. Fresh Next.js + Supabase + Stripe setup. |
| 5 | **Design direction?** Minimal dashboard? Opinionated brand? Reference apps? | Clean, minimal. Similar to Linear's aesthetic. Dark mode support. shadcn/ui components. |
